trust_report.cds_edition_used: 2027-2028 NOT yet posted (target Fall 2027). Stanford's official CDS index at irds.stanford.edu returns HTTP 403 to automated fetch, so the exact direct PDF/xlsx URL and latest edition could not be verified by fetching; per current search listings the most recent posted editions are 2024-2025 (Class of 2028, widely referenced) and 2025-2026. The linked URL is the authoritative CDS landing/index page.
trust_report.doctrine: null-over-guess; deterministic fields anchored to CDS/Scorecard with provenance; high-stakes fields blind-verified; arithmetic-gated; every source consulted is logged

overall_acceptance_rate.quote: CDS C1: "Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who applied 60,646 / Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who were admitted 2,302" [computed: 2,302/60,646 = 3.80%; CDS states counts, not the rate]
overall_acceptance_rate.as_of_cycle: Fall 2025 (CDS 2025-2026); target Fall 2027 CDS not yet published

transfer_acceptance_rate.quote: CDS D1 Transfer Admission, Total row: Applicants 4,532 / Admitted 102 / Enrolled 89 [computed: 102/4,532 = 2.25%]

applications_total.quote: CDS C1: "Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who applied 60,646"

admits_total.quote: CDS C1: "Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who were admitted 2,302"

enrolled_total.quote: CDS C1: "Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who enrolled 1,839" (*enrollment counts exclude students who deferred from a prior year)

yield_rate.quote: CDS C1: enrolled 1,839 of admitted 2,302 [computed yield: 1,839/2,302 = 79.89%; CDS states counts, not the rate]

admits_class_size.quote: CDS C1: enrolled first-time first-year class size = "Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who enrolled 1,839" (the entering Class of 2029; admits_total was 2,302)

sat_reading_middle_50.quote: CDS C9: "SAT Evidence-Based Reading and Writing 750 760 780" (25th / 50th / 75th percentile)

test_submission_rate.quote: CDS C9: "Submitting SAT Scores 55.57% 1,022 / Submitting ACT Scores 20.94% 385" [combined: (1,022+385)/1,839 enrolled = 76.51%; may include students submitting both]

gpa_unweighted_avg.quote: CDS C11 (4.0 scale): "Average high school GPA of all degree-seeking, first-time, first-year students who submitted GPA: 3.94"

race_white.quote: CDS B2, Degree-Seeking First-Time First Year column: "White, non-Hispanic 466" of TOTAL 1,866 [computed 466/1,866 = 24.97%; CDS states headcounts]

race_black.quote: CDS B2, First-Time First Year column: "Black or African American, non-Hispanic 68" of 1,866 [computed 68/1,866 = 3.64%]

race_hispanic.quote: CDS B2, First-Time First Year column: "Hispanic/Latino 232" of 1,866 [computed 232/1,866 = 12.43%]

race_asian.quote: CDS B2, First-Time First Year column: "Asian, non-Hispanic 657" of 1,866 [computed 657/1,866 = 35.21%]

race_native_american.quote: CDS B2, First-Time First Year column: "American Indian or Alaska Native, non-Hispanic 7" of 1,866 [computed 7/1,866 = 0.38%]

race_pacific_islander.quote: CDS B2, First-Time First Year column: "Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander, non-Hispanic 3" of 1,866 [computed 3/1,866 = 0.16%]

race_two_or_more.quote: CDS B2, First-Time First Year column: "Two or more races, non-Hispanic 183" of 1,866 [computed 183/1,866 = 9.81%]

race_unknown.quote: CDS B2, First-Time First Year column: "Race and/or ethnicity unknown 13" of 1,866 [computed 13/1,866 = 0.70%]

race_international.quote: CDS B2, First-Time First Year column: "Nonresidents 237" of 1,866 [computed 237/1,866 = 12.70%]

international_percentage.quote: CDS B2, First-Time First Year column: "Nonresidents 237" of 1,866 [computed 237/1,866 = 12.70%]; (all-undergraduate nonresidents = 965 of 7,346 = 13.14%)

freshman_retention_rate.quote: CDS B22: "...number of all first-time, full-time, bachelor's...students who entered in Fall 2024...1,693... how many were still enrolled...in Fall 2025. 1,650...percentage of the Fall 2025 entering cohort who remained enrolled...97.46%"
freshman_retention_rate.as_of_cycle: Fall 2024 entering cohort, retained to Fall 2025 (CDS 2025-2026)

graduation_rate_4_year.quote: CDS B (Fall 2019 cohort): final cohort C=1,698; line D "completed the program in four years or less" Total = 770 [computed D/C = 770/1,698 = 45.35%; CDS states the 6-yr rate as a %, not the 4-yr rate]

graduation_rate_6_year.quote: CDS B, Fall 2019 cohort, "Six-year graduation rate for 2019 cohort (G divided by C)" Total column = 91.64%

in_state_tuition.quote: CDS G1 ("Provide 2026-2027 academic year costs"), Private Institutions: "Tuition: $67,731 $67,731" (min/max). Stanford is private; a single tuition rate applies regardless of residency. Required fees $843 listed separately.

median_earnings_10yr.source: U.S. Dept of Education College Scorecard
median_earnings_10yr.quote: College Scorecard API (api.data.gov, id=243744): "latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median": 124080 (median earnings 10 years after entry, most recent Scorecard release)
median_earnings_10yr.as_of_cycle: College Scorecard latest release (most recent available; backward-looking ~10-yr-post-entry cohort)

is_test_optional.quote: CDS C8A ("for students applying for Fall 2027"): "SAT or ACT" is checked X (required). Clarification: "Stanford reinstated its standardized testing requirement beginning with applications for Fall 2026 entry. ACT or SAT scores are now required."
is_test_optional.as_of_cycle: Fall 2027 admission cycle (CDS 2025-2026 C8A); effective Fall 2026+

test_policy_details.value: SAT or ACT required (test-required). Stanford reinstated its standardized testing requirement beginning with applications for Fall 2026 entry; ACT or SAT scores are now required. C8A test-use policy reported for students applying for Fall 2027.
test_policy_details.quote: CDS C8 clarification: "Stanford reinstated its standardized testing requirement beginning with applications for Fall 2026 entry. ACT or SAT scores are now required." C8: "Does your institution make use of SAT or ACT scores in decisions...? Yes"; C8A box "SAT or ACT" checked. Latest date scores must be received: 15-Jan.
test_policy_details.as_of_cycle: Fall 2027 admission cycle (CDS 2025-2026 C8A); effective Fall 2026+

OFFICIAL Stanford Common Data Set 2024-2025 PDF (title page confirms year). Extracted Section H2/H2A via pdfminer: avg need-based scholarship & grant $70,114 (first-year)/$68,013 (full-time undergrad); avg aid package $74,244/$72,172; % need met 100.0%; athletic avg $58,360 (529)/$56,823 (139); non-need non-athletic $7,017 (44)/$4,150 (2); aggregate need-based institutional grants $242,724,957, federal $10,559,186, state $3,254,150, athletic $30,872,620; counts (7,841 undergrad, 3,928 awarded aid, 3,885 need-based grant, etc.). Primary quantitative source.
